programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne pops in at Small-Fry to see his friend Rhys and enjoy a sweet treat before heading to the Huon Valley. Ben is then given a behind-the-scenes tour by James Bender, who works in the family-owned business that supplies the worlds most loved salmon.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne finishes his exploration of Tasmania heading out to the rocky waters between Hobart and Bruny Island. Guided by Rob from the Seafood Seduction Tour, Ben experiences the freshest seafood imaginable. Ben concludes his journey overlooking the beautiful South Coast.

programme.desc: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.

programme.title: Serena
programme.desc: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A pregnant assassin, code-named The Bride, goes into a coma for four years after her ex-boss Bill brutally attacks her. When she wakes up, she sets out to get revenge against him and his associates.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Reginald's manager helps him rise to fame, but also creates chaos in his life.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns saves a cricket during a soccer game.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Anthony's belongings have made a mess in the Wiggly lounge room; the Wiggles need to get it cleaned up for Wags' upcoming Wiggly dog dance.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: The children notice that Grady is sad, and Barney shows them that a little kindness can go a long way; it adds a bit of magic to the actions of children who inspire others, showing everyone the power of their good deeds.

programme.title: Miss Persona
programme.desc: Miss Persona sings a song to remind Brandon that he is her sunshine.

programme.title: Toon Bops
programme.desc: Monkey, Doggy, and Dino do a silly dance in this rock and roll music video.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle shows how to make a memory capsule; Peppa and George discover a rock pool; Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up after breakfast; Peppa and her family and friends go to the boating pond.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: After the crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove; Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help Crunchy the beaver cross the road.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: When the Legion of Zoom plans to cheat its way to winning the Gotham Grand Prix, the Batwheels zoom into action to ensure the race is won fairly.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders
programme.desc: Sunny Seagull hires The Looney Builders to build a carnival on Looneyburg's pier; the crew gets so caught up trying to win the games that they lose sight of what matters.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go
programme.desc: Thomas learns that the rocket he helped deliver is finally falling back to Earth into the ocean outside Sodor; after Sir Topham Hatt messes up his instructions for Kenji's passenger delivery, Thomas is asked to set things right.

programme.title: Agent Binky: Pets of the Universe
programme.desc: Binky sees an alien changing from a caterpillar to a butterfly; the Humans bring a new recliner chair home.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: Hamsters of Hamsterdale
programme.desc: A motley crew of hamsters mistake their 8-year-old owner Harry as their King and beloved ruler of their elaborate, colorful-tubed kingdom.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Buddy, the playful dragon from one of Alex's books, gets out and the pups need to get him back.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Francois' trailer becomes unhooked and all of his critters get loose.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Grover, and all their friends help Charlie build a Little Library for her Mitzvah Day project for her synagogue. Helping neighbors share books is Charlie's way of making the world a kinder place.

programme.title: Sesame Street

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: To distract Intelligence from the investigation into his son, Chief O'Neal forces the team to handle a "dead fish" case; when that dead fish turns into a complicated heater case, Burgess is thrown back into difficult memories from her past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: After a shocking discovery, the team begins closing in on Sean O'Neal with every shred of evidence they can find; determined to keep his son out of prison, Chief O'Neal hires a lawyer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A series of brutal home invasion robberies finds the team paired with Detective Borkowski, an old friend of Ruzek's, to work the case; things get complicated for Torres when it becomes clear Borkowski has a vastly different policing style.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A shocking ambush at a funeral leads the team into a heated investigation to find the shooters; much to Atwater's surprise, he must rely on someone from his past to help in the investigation, dredging up old memories and revealing new truths.

A fire breaks out in an accountant's office and a car crashes into a "living funeral"; Athena is shocked when a suspect dies in her custody minutes after she arrests him; Buck is attracted to a death doula; Maddie and Chimney are audited by the IRS.

The 118 race to rescue two roommates desperately trying to find a needle in a haystack at a landfill, and help a woman whose nightmare dream suddenly becomes a painful reality; Athena and Maddie team up to find a missing boy in a crowded mall.

A wedding proposal tragically intersects with a bank robbery; a bride is literally stuck on her way to the altar; Athena talks a victim through her grief; Buck finds a surprise visitor on his doorstep.
A series of freeway car accidents leads to a catastrophic overpass collapse that endangers the lives of civilians and members of the 118.
Athena and Bobby set off on their honeymoon cruise, but when duty calls, their vacation is put on hold; a fighter jet traps a civilian; an unusual incident leaves a couple stuck together.

The disastrous cruise continues when Bobby and Athena respond to the ship's explosion, racing to aid injured passengers; Hen questions her instincts in a life-taking call and grows concerned about Athena and Bobby's whereabouts.

With each moment becoming critical as the ship flips upside down, Athena and Bobby take charge, seeking methods for rescue while navigating efforts to guide survivors to safety; Hen defies protocols in her search for Bobby and Athena.
